external.description: Historically, marketers relied on designers and other creative professionals to develop images and videos for personalized online ad campaigns. In late 2024, seven-year-old startup Hightouch launched an AI-powered service that allows marketing professionals to create custom content for brands such as Domino’s, Chime, PetSmart, and Spotify without involving brand design teams or ad agencies. The offering has been highly successful. Since introducing its AI product 20 months ago, Hightouch has added $70 million in annualized recurring revenue (ARR), it tells TechCrunch, bringing the startup to a total of $100 million in ARR.

record.text: dass die Fantasy Light-Novel »Majo to Yōhei« von Kaeru Chōhōkiteki eine Anime-Adaption erhält. Der Anime soll im Laufe des nächsten Jahres 2027 im japanischen TV starten. Zudem stellte man den japanischen Sprechercast und Produktion offiziell vor.

images.alt:
Die Geschichte startete im Juni 2021 als Webnovel auf Shosetsuka ni Naro und endete dort im Dezember 2022. Ab Mai 2023 veröffentlichte Micro Magazine das Werk mit Illustrationen von Bench Kanase als Printausgabe und umfasst 7 Bände.
Die gleichnamige Manga-Adaption wird von Makoto Miyagi umgesetzt. Diese läuft seit Januar 2024 in der Magazine Pocket App von Kodansha und umfasst bislang 7 Bände. Eine englische Übersetzung des Manga gibt es bei K Manga.

»Witch and Mercenary« entsteht bei 8bit (That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime) unter der Regie von Shinpei Ezaki (Kono Oto Tomare!: Sounds of Life), die Series Composition übernimmt Daishiro Tanimura (Wistoria: Wand and Sword), das Character Design stammt von Keita Matsumoto, die Soundregie liegt bei Akiko Fujita und die Musik komponiert Rei Ishizuka (The Apothecary Diaries).

📜 Beschreibung 》
In einer Welt, in der Hexen als Katastrophen gefürchtet und gnadenlos verfolgt werden, ist Siasha auf der Flucht vor denen, die ihren Tod wollen. Gemeinsam mit dem wortkargen Söldner Zig bricht sie in unbekannte Gebiete auf, um einen Ort zu finden, an dem sie endlich sicher sein kann. Doch fernab der Menschen lauern uralte Schrecken, vergessene Magie und neue Gefahren, die ihre Reise zu einem erbitterten Kampf ums Überleben machen.

»Zig Crane« von Taito Ban
Ein äußerst fähiger Söldner mit enormer Kampfkraft und außergewöhnlich widerstandsfähigem Körper. Als seltener Nutzer eines Doppelklingenschwerts verfügt er über keinerlei Magie. Zwar schreckt er bei einem Auftrag auch vor dem Töten nicht zurück, doch sinnlose Gewalt liegt ihm fern. Im Rahmen einer Hexenjagd trifft er schließlich auf Siasha.

»Siasha« von Saori Hayami
Eine gefürchtete, als „Schweigende Hexe“ bekannte Ausnahmeerscheinung. Sie ist von großer Schönheit und beherrscht vor allem Erdmagie. Da ihr die menschliche Denkweise oft fremd ist, wirkt sie weltfremd, besitzt jedoch einen ausgeprägten Forschergeist und großes Interesse daran, neues Wissen zu sammeln. Nach ihrer Begegnung mit Zig bittet sie ihn um Schutz.

Die Geschichte startete im Juni 2021 als Webnovel auf Shosetsuka ni Naro und endete dort im Dezember 2022. Ab Mai 2023 veröffentlichte Micro Magazine das Werk mit Illustrationen von Bench Kanase als Printausgabe und umfasst 7 Bände.
Die gleichnamige Manga-Adaption wird von Makoto Miyagi umgesetzt. Diese läuft seit Januar 2024 in der Magazine Pocket App von Kodansha und umfasst bislang 7 Bände. Eine englische Übersetzung des Manga gibt es bei K Manga.

»Witch and Mercenary« entsteht bei 8bit (That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime) unter der Regie von Shinpei Ezaki (Kono Oto Tomare!: Sounds of Life), die Series Composition übernimmt Daishiro Tanimura (Wistoria: Wand and Sword), das Character Design stammt von Keita Matsumoto, die Soundregie liegt bei Akiko Fujita und die Musik komponiert Rei Ishizuka (The Apothecary Diaries).

📜 Beschreibung 》
In einer Welt, in der Hexen als Katastrophen gefürchtet und gnadenlos verfolgt werden, ist Siasha auf der Flucht vor denen, die ihren Tod wollen. Gemeinsam mit dem wortkargen Söldner Zig bricht sie in unbekannte Gebiete auf, um einen Ort zu finden, an dem sie endlich sicher sein kann. Doch fernab der Menschen lauern uralte Schrecken, vergessene Magie und neue Gefahren, die ihre Reise zu einem erbitterten Kampf ums Überleben machen.

»Zig Crane« von Taito Ban
Ein äußerst fähiger Söldner mit enormer Kampfkraft und außergewöhnlich widerstandsfähigem Körper. Als seltener Nutzer eines Doppelklingenschwerts verfügt er über keinerlei Magie. Zwar schreckt er bei einem Auftrag auch vor dem Töten nicht zurück, doch sinnlose Gewalt liegt ihm fern. Im Rahmen einer Hexenjagd trifft er schließlich auf Siasha.

»Siasha« von Saori Hayami

Da ihr die menschliche Denkweise oft fremd ist, wirkt sie weltfremd, besitzt jedoch einen ausgeprägten Forschergeist und großes Interesse daran, neues Wissen zu sammeln. As a therapist and a healthcare worker, chatbots are becoming a public health crisis, and I’m tired of hearing people who don’t see the harm every day explain why this is totally fine and just like people pearl-clutching over cellphones. It’s getting worse and we haven’t scratched the surface.

value.text:
A woman sued OpenAI last week alleging that ChatGPT reinforced the obsessive, violent delusions of her stalker (her ex-boyfriend.)

This woman's claims (as detailed by TechCrunch, left) are chillingly similar to those of a completely different woman whose story Futurism reported on in Feb (right):

images.alt: Doe had broken up with the user in 2024, and he used ChatGPT to process the split, according to emails and communications cited in the lawsuit. Rather than push back on his one-sided account, it repeatedly cast him as rational and wronged, and her as manipulative and unstable. He then took these AI-generated conclusions off the screen and into the real world, using them to stalk and harass her. This manifested in several AI-generated, clinical-looking psychological reports that he distributed to her family, friends, and employer.

For months, her then-fiancé and partner of several years had been fixating on her and their relationship with OpenAI’s ChatGPT. In mid-2024, she explained, they’d hit a rough patch as a couple; in response, he turned to ChatGPT, which he’d previously used for general business-related tasks, for “therapy.” 

Before she knew it, she recalled, he was spending hours each day talking with the bot, funneling everything she said or did into the model and propounding on pseudo-psychiatric theories about her mental health and behavior. He started to bombard the woman with screenshots of his ChatGPT interactions and copy-pasted AI-generated text, in which the chatbot can be seen armchair-diagnosing her with personality disorders and insisting that she was concealing her real feelings and behavior through coded language. The bot often laced its so-called analyses with flowery spiritual jargon, accusing the woman of engaging in manipulative “rituals.”

Trying to communicate with her fiancé was like walking on “ChatGPT eggshells,” the woman recalled. No matter what she tried, ChatGPT would “twist it.”

“He would send [screenshots] to me from ChatGPT, and be like, ‘Why does it say this? Why would it say this about you, if this is not true?'” she recounted. “And it was just awful, awful things.”

Shortly after moving out, the former fiancé began to publish multiple videos and images a day on social media accusing the woman of an array of alleged abuses — the same bizarre ideas he’d fixated on so extensively with ChatGPT.

In some videos, he stares into the camera, reading from seemingly AI-generated scripts; others feature ChatGPT-generated text overlaid on spiritual or sci-fi-esque graphics. In multiple posts, he describes stabbing the woman. In another, he discusses surveilling her. (The posts, which we’ve reviewed, are intensely disturbing; we’re not quoting directly from them or the man’s ChatGPT transcripts due to concern for the woman’s privacy and safety.)

The ex-fiancé also published revenge porn of the woman on social media, shared her full name and other personal information, and doxxed the names and ages of her teenage children from a previous marriage. He created a new TikTok dedicated to harassing content — complete with its own hashtag — and followed the woman’s family, friends, and neighbors, as well as other teens from her kids’ high school.

“I’ve lived in this small town my entire life,” said the woman. “I couldn’t leave my house for months… people were messaging me all over my social media, like, ‘Are you safe? Are your kids safe? What is happening right now?'”

images.alt:
Heya! I'm Radha (They/them), I'm a 21 y/o Irish 🇮🇪 🇪🇺 comp player and community contributor, looking to get back to competitive play. I'm a **wiper 1-trick** and have been since the start of S3

I do interviews, host the spl community census, and up until recently I was org lead @ Splatoon Stronghold, having worked in the org for nearly 2 years. I've also been a coach and team manager both inside and outside the SBA. I'm *very* passionate about the community behind the game, and am generally highly sociable (I'm a big people person :3)

## Comp experience:
- First played competitively in **2020**, been on and off competing ever since
- **4,000** hours across the franchise
- **2561.1** XP peak
- Seeded **LUTI D4** in season 16
- **LI banned**

My biggest strength is my confidence in taking and winning engagements/setting them up for my teammates. I have a lot of experience with my weapon and the way I play is highly based on instinct.

My biggest weakness is formulating and sticking to a big picture plan, because I play so instinctually, sometimes it can be hard to rein myself in to service a larger goal needed of the match.

## What I'm looking for (ordered)
- No bigots <3
- A team that can play around wiper
- I'm not *too* stressed abt your current skill level (within reason) but I do care abt my teammates' capacity for improvement, being able to show that is important
- Emotional maturity
- A healthy fun little friend group with silly guys
- Compatible with my weekday time schedule (I'd like to not be limited to only playing weekends)

The modern man is often highly committed: appointments, meetings, and travel shape daily life, and personal connections are often neglected. And that’s exactly why the demand for carefree, high-quality encounters that can be flexibly integrated into everyday life is growing.

Luxury dating in Berlin is tailored precisely to these men. It’s not about lengthy breaking-the-ice phases or elaborate planning, but about stylish, direct encounters on eye level, true to the motto: quality over quantity.

### Lavish hotel bars: encounters at luxury level

Berlin is popular for its luxurious hotel bars, which impress not only with their elegant ambiance but also serve as meeting points for international guests. The tasteful bars in renowned five-star hotels offer the perfect location for spontaneous encounters.

Business travelers, influencers, and style-conscious people gather here. A smooth appearance, a good sense for conversation starters, and a touch of self-confidence are often enough to make interesting connections. The relaxed yet exclusive atmosphere makes it easy to strike up a conversation – offering an ideal opening for a spontaneous date or even a one-night stand.

For men with limited time, these locations are ideal: no long searching, just targeted encounters in an environment that already guarantees a certain level of sophistication and quality.

### Secret luxury: VIP escorts offer an exclusive option

A classy, discreet Berlin escort service stands for absolute privacy, professionalism, and high-class standards. The advantages are obvious: no uncertainty, no lengthy organization, but a customized experience that perfectly matches personal preferences.

Such an arrangement allows you to fully focus on the moment. Your lady companion is not only attractive but also communicative, stylish, and feels at ease in a sophisticated environment — ideal for men who value class and confidentiality. Whether for a relaxed dinner, a drink in an exclusive venue, or a no-strings-attached, discreet private encounter: a VIP escort offers maximum flexibility with minimal time investment.

### Lounges and rooftop bars: a stylish night in Berlin

If you prefer a more classic yet still stylish approach, Berlin’s many lounges and rooftop bars are your ideal choice. These venues combine urban lifestyle with a lavish ambiance and offer breathtaking views of the city.

Connections often happen naturally over a glass of champagne, with relaxed music and a fashionable clientele. Guests are international, open-minded, and often also looking for special, commitment-free company.

A major advantage: the ambiance is less formal than in traditional hotel bars, making conversations easier and more spontaneous. For the busy man, this means less effort, more efficiency and still a high-end experience.

### Chic cafés: tasteful flirting during the day

Not every encounter must take place at night. Berlin offers a wide range of elegant cafés that are perfect for classy daytime meetings. Especially in districts like Mitte or Charlottenburg, you’ll find stylish spots where business-people, creatives, and international guests come together.

A short coffee break between appointments may quickly turn into something more if you manage to send and receive the right signals. The atmosphere is relaxed yet sophisticated enough to meet interesting people.

For men with tight schedules, this is an ideal way to integrate dating into everyday life without investing extra time.

### Efficiency meets pleasure

Most of all, luxury dating in Berlin stands for efficiency without sacrificing quality. Whether through a discreet companionship service or spontaneous encounters in upscale locations, the options are diverse and tailored to the needs of modern, successful men.

The city provides the perfect setting to combine business and pleasure. Those who know where to look and are open to stylish encounters will soon realize that Berlin is a true paradise for classy, uncomplicated dating.

### Make it happen

In a city that never sleeps and is constantly in motion, flexible solutions for personal desires are essential. Luxury dating in Berlin offers exactly that: discreet, stylish, and efficient ways to experience special moments – even on a busy schedule.

Whether in an elegant hotel bar, a trendy rooftop lounge, a chic café, or through an exclusive escort agency, the German capital offers countless opportunities to combine business and pleasure at the highest level.

value.text: A classic case of "only the left has agency" where anti-zionism is a prejudice people hold entirely unrelated to circumstances but extremist zionism gets attributed completely to the circumstances.

record.text: Hmmm. So, Netanyahu "has openly boasted of preventing (a Palestinian state) for decades." Yet somehow, decades of protest and condemnation of Netanyahu's policies is somehow illegitimate, because some of the critics are/were anti-semites? That seems inconsistent.

images.alt: The argument is narrower, and more important. A government without Ben Gvir and Smotrich — which Israeli polling now consistently projects — would almost certainly end the active acceleration of West Bank settlement expansion. It would stop the state’s functional tolerance of settler violence against Palestinian civilians. It would restore a working relationship with the Palestinian Authority rather than working to collapse it. It would not pursue the agenda that Netanyahu — who once endorsed a Palestinian state at Bar-Ilan and spent the following decade systematically undermining the possibility of one — has openly boasted of preventing for decades. The coalition enabling it exists in no small part because a prime minister facing corruption charges needed far-right partners willing to keep him in power. These are not small things. They are the difference between a political horizon and the deliberate elimination of one.

record.text: Let's pause for a moment to see what a truly astounding progress the industry has made in improving AI efficiency.

images.alt: Google’s Gemma 4 E2B-it is a 2-billion-parameter model. Open weights. Four gigabytes on disk. Free. We believed it could match GPT-3.5 Turbo — a 175-billion-parameter closed-source model running on OpenAI’s GPU cloud, the model that powered ChatGPT for over a year, the model that set the bar for “good enough for production” — on a consumer CPU. An 87-to-1 size difference. That kind of claim requires proof, not assertions.
